```aro
(OrderService: OrderService) {
    Extract the <orderId> from the <request: pathParameters>.
    Return the<OK: status> for the <result>.
}

(OrderService: CreateOrder) {
    Extract the <order> from the <request: body>.
    Store the <order> into the <order-repository>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <order>.
}

(OrderService: GetOrder) {
    Extract the <orderId> from the <request: pathParameters>.
    Retrieve the <order> from the <order-repository> where id =<orderId>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <order>.
}

(OrderService: ListOrders) {
    Retrieve all <orders> from the <order-repository>.
    Return the<OK: status> with the <orders>.
}
```
